mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods ( goods_name, goods_intro, goods_price, category_id, stock_num, goods_image, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{goodsName}, #{goodsIntro}, #{goodsPrice}, #{categoryId}, #{stockNum}, #{goodsImage}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET goods_name = #{goodsName}, goods_intro = #{goodsIntro}, goods_price = #{goodsPrice}, category_id = #{categoryId}, stock_num = #{stockNum}, goods_image = #{goodsImage}, update_time = NOW() WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}
mapper.select:
select goods_id,goods_price from goods where goods_id in
#{dto.goodsId}
